ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Setting name of the facility (e.g., Barry J. Nidorf Juvenile Hall) */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Setting type of the facility (e.g., Sylmar, CA) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of facility (foreign key referencing facility_types table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type (e.g., Juvenile Hall, Police Department, State Prison) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the staff member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., administrator, health official, personnel) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detainees_inmates" (
  "detainee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detainee/inmate */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the detainee/inmate is located at */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the detainee/inmate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the detainee/inmate (e.g., COVID-19 positive, COVID-19 negative) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the detainee/inmate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the detainee/inmate */,
  "date_of_admission" TEXT /* Date the detainee/inmate was admitted */,
  "date_of_release" TEXT /* Date the detainee/inmate was released (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detainee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detainees_inmates_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 case */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the case was reported */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who reported the case (if applicable) */,
  "detainee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detainee/inmate who reported the case (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., confirmed, recovered, deceased) */,
  "date_confirmed" TEXT /* Date the case was confirmed */,
  "date_recovered" TEXT /* Date the case was recovered */,
  "date_deceased" TEXT /* Date the case was deceased */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the case (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_detainee_id FOREIGN KEY ("detainee_id") REFERENCES detainees_inmates ("detainee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 related death */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case that resulted in death */,
  "date_deceased" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recoveries" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 recovery */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case that resulted in recovery */,
  "date_recovered" TEXT /* Date of recovery */,
  "recovery_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recoveries_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_staff" (
  "facility_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility staff member */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the staff member belongs to */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., administrator, health official) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_staff_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_staff_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_detainees_inmates" (
  "facility_detainee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility detainee/inmate */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the detainee/inmate is located at */,
  "detainee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detainee/inmate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the detainee/inmate (e.g., COVID-19 positive, COVID-19 negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_detainee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_detainees_inmates_detainee_id FOREIGN KEY ("detainee_id") REFERENCES detainees_inmates ("detainee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_detainees_inmates_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the alert was generated */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., outbreak, high risk) */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, health official, personnel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_facilities" (
  "user_facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-facility pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility accessible to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_facilities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_facilities_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., status change, notes addition) */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being commented on */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the attachment belongs to */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was added */,
  "attachment_file" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_attachments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the vaccination belongs to */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the test result belongs to */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the treatment belongs to */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES covid_cases ("case_id")
)
